metaData.Key Information: Steve & Leif Avant-Garde Design Safety Glasses Model 9011 made of Polycarbonate lenses are highly resistant to impact and anti scratch. When sporty design meets safety requirement! Designed to be lightweight, nylon frame, rubber non-slip nose pads with side temple pads for secure fit and all-day comfort. Your excellent choice for a pair of safety glasses to protect your eyes from exposure to hazardous working environment. Tested and complies with international safety standards (CE EN166 + UV400 + ANSI Z87.1). Made in Taiwan.

metaData.Key Information:
- On-the-Go Ease: Black, robust handles, coupled with an ergonomic design, turn relocating into a simple task. Whether it's a quick room switch or a flight of stairs, 'HANDY' has your back.
- Masterful Space Optimisation: Stack, store, and savour the extra room! The 'HANDY' range is adept at blending into any nook, making the most of Singapore's premium spaces.
- Instant Insight: With its crystal clarity, the days of hide-and-seek with your belongings are over. Spot, grab, and go!
- Locked-in Safety: With snap-lock handles, 'HANDY' ensures your items are wrapped in security, warding off mishaps.
- Chic Functionality: Beyond its practicality, 'HANDY' flaunts a design that complements homes and offices. Its understated elegance is bound to catch the eye.
